cap_614_20110630000000_en_p.xml.heading: Powers to give chapter numbers etc.
cap_614_20110630000000_en_p.xml.plain_text:
11.
Powers to give chapter numbers etc.
The Secretary for Justice may—
(a)
give a chapter number to an Ordinance and alter the title, short title or citation of the Ordinance; and (Amended 26 of 2012 s. 17)
(b)
in the database, arrange the grouping and sequence of database instruments.
